steps.t: Inside Moria, you found an old sketch of a flower. You should find someone who knows something about this flower.
The Nauthlandir flower can possibly be found somewhere in Fangorn Forest. You should find the Nauthlandir flower.
Galathril resides within Lothlórien. You should talk to Galathril.
Orring can be found in Thorin's Hall. You should bring the medicine to Orring.
